basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Indore is recruiting 02 Research Associate-I positions for the LINKS project focusing on Indian language infrastructures. Ph.D. holders with ML/NLP experience can apply.

important_dates.interview_date: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

age_limit.age_details: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years
age_limit.details: No specific upper age limit mentioned. Candidates should meet the project and institutional requirements.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Computational Linguistics, Information Science, Digital Humanities, or related discipline + Experience in Machine Learning and/or Natural Language Processing

vacancy_details.Duration: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years

post_wise_breakdown.duration: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years

category_wise_vacancy.Duration: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years

selection_process: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Interview (only shortlisted candidates will be contacted). Final selection depends on academic record
how_to_apply: Interested candidates should email a single PDF file containing:
Cover letter describing relevant experience and research interests
Copies of degree certificates and mark sheets
Email to: [email protected] Subject Line: Application for Research Associate-I (LINKS Project)
important_instructions: The position is temporary and extendable based on performance and funds. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interview. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview. IIT Indore reserves the right not to fill the positions. Incomplete applications will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: IIT Indore invites applications for engagement of Research Associate-I (02 positions) in the ANRF-funded project LINKS. The selected candidates will work on Machine Learning, NLP, multilingual corpora, and FAIR-compliant digital infrastructures. The appointment is purely temporary and based on performance and project needs.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Indore is recruiting 02 Research Associate-I positions for the LINKS project focusing on Indian language infrastructures. Ph.D. holders with ML/NLP experience can apply.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_iit_indor: LINKS: Language Infrastructure and Networked Knowledge Systems
Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.date: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate Vacancy Details 2026

rows.duration: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Computational Linguistics, Information Science, Digital Humanities, or related discipline + Experience in Machine Learning and/or Natural Language Processing
Proficiency in Python and NLP/ML frameworks, Deep Learning, corpus development, metadata standards, FAIR principles, good academic writing and publications

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific upper age limit mentioned. Candidates should meet the project and institutional requirements.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Interview (only shortlisted candidates will be contacted). Final selection depends on academic record, research experience, and interview performance.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should email a single PDF file containing: Updated CV Cover letter describing relevant experience and research interests Copies of degree certificates and mark sheets List of publications (if any) Contact details of two referees Email to: [email protected] Subject Line: Application for Research Associate-I (LINKS Project)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Indore Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is temporary and extendable based on performance and funds. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interview. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview. IIT Indore reserves the right not to fill the positions. Incomplete applications will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Indore Research Associate-I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application is 30 July 2026 (or till positions are filled).

faq.question: Q2. How many Research Associate positions are available at IIT Indore under LINKS project?
faq.answer: There are 02 positions of Research Associate-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the duration of the Research Associate position at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years based on performance.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IIT Indore Research Associate?
faq.answer: Ph.D. in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Computational Linguistics or related fields with ML/NLP experience.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Indore LINKS Project Research Associate?
faq.answer: Send a single PDF (CV, cover letter, certificates, publications, referees) to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q6. What are the desirable skills for IIT Indore Research Associate-I?
faq.answer: Proficiency in Python, Deep Learning, corpus development, metadata standards, and FAIR principles.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIT Indore Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q8. Will IIT Indore conduct an interview for Research Associate selection?
faq.answer: Yes, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Research Associate position at IIT Indore permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary project-based position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the focus of the LINKS project at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Building integrated digital infrastructures for Indian languages based on Open Access, Bibliodiversity, and Interoperability.
